title: MetricAnchor Semantic Model
description: Defines business metrics, dimensions, and filters for a dataset.

name.description: Unique identifier for this semantic model.

dataset.description: Name of the dataset this model applies to. Must match the uploaded dataset name.

description.description: Human-readable description of this model and its intended use.

metrics.description: List of business metrics defined for this dataset.

name.description: Unique metric name used in natural language questions.

description.description: Plain-English definition of this metric shown to users in trust output.

expression.description: SQL aggregate expression, e.g. SUM(order_total) or COUNT(DISTINCT user_id).

value.description: Filter value — string, number, or array for IN/NOT IN.

aliases.description: Alternative names users might use when asking about this metric.

dimensions.description: Columns users can group by or filter on in natural language.

column.description: Actual column name in the dataset.

time_column.description: The primary date/timestamp column used for time-based filtering and aggregation.
